summary: TWO_COLUMN: ζ(s) plotted on real axis 1<s<6 with always_redraw moving dot + dashed vertical line driven by ValueTracker s_tr sweeping 2→3→5→1.5→2→1.1. Right column has live s, ζ(s) value (1000-term truncation), plus special values ζ(2)=π²/6, ζ(4)=π⁴/90, ζ(6)=π⁶/945, and asymptotic behavior.
